error_chain: Prometheus PromQL engine evaluates query and hits context deadline timeout in promql/engine.go
Prometheus v1 API handler catches engine error and returns HTTP 503 with error body in web/api/v1/api.go
Grafana datasource proxy receives HTTP 503 from upstream Prometheus in pkg/api/datasource_proxy.go
Grafana proxy translates non-2xx upstream response to generic Bad Gateway error for the frontend
Grafana frontend displays Bad Gateway message without original Prometheus timeout context
trigger_conditions: PromQL query with high cardinality regex matcher causes evaluation timeout in engine
Grafana datasource proxy timeout is shorter than Prometheus query timeout causing context deadline exceeded
Prometheus server is under heavy query load and cannot evaluate within timeout
Grafana proxy discards upstream error response body when translating to frontend error format

expected_answer.error_origin: Prometheus PromQL engine timeout in promql/engine.go when query evaluation exceeds context deadline
expected_answer.error_translation: Grafana datasource proxy in pkg/api/datasource_proxy.go translates upstream HTTP 503 to generic Bad Gateway without preserving error body
expected_answer.root_cause: The datasource proxy does not forward the Prometheus error response body to the frontend, losing the specific timeout context
